title: The Eminence in Shadow
description:
Cid Kagenou has always dreamed of becoming a mysterious mastermind who secretly controls events from the shadows while pretending to be an ordinary background character. After dying in his previous life, he is reincarnated into a fantasy world where magic truly exists, giving him the perfect opportunity to pursue his delusional ambitions. Creating a secret organization known as Shadow Garden, Cid invents a fictional evil cult as part of his role-playing fantasy, completely unaware that the cult actually exists in reality.

As Shadow Garden begins fighting dangerous enemies connected to the Cult of Diablos, Cid continues acting out his fantasies while unintentionally influencing the fate of the entire world. Alongside powerful allies who genuinely believe in him, he becomes involved in political conspiracies, large-scale battles, and hidden conflicts without ever realizing how serious the situation truly is. Combining action, fantasy, comedy, and overpowered protagonist elements, The Eminence in Shadow delivers a stylish and entertaining story about power, imagination, and life behind the scenes.
